title: Accenture (ACN)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on Accenture using FY2025 actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what Accenture is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-hzvpl4z6>
Accenture has historically delivered solid high-single to low-double-digit growth. We use a conservative 8% for Phase 1 to account for potential macroeconomic headwinds in IT spending, offset by strong secular tailwinds in GenAI consulting and digital transformations.

discountRate.title: Discount Rate (WACC)
discountRate.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-hzvpl4z6>
Accenture has historically delivered solid high-single to low-double-digit growth. We use a conservative 8% for Phase 1 to account for potential macroeconomic headwinds in IT spending, offset by strong secular tailwinds in GenAI consulting and digital transformations.

terminalGrowth.title: Terminal Growth Rate
terminalGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-hzvpl4z6>
Accenture has historically delivered solid high-single to low-double-digit growth. We use a conservative 8% for Phase 1 to account for potential macroeconomic headwinds in IT spending, offset by strong secular tailwinds in GenAI consulting and digital transformations.

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).

risks.introText: Our intrinsic value calculation assumes business as usual. Here are the primary risks that could challenge this assumption.

items.title: GenAI explosion
items.description: If enterprise adoption of Generative AI accelerates sharply, Accenture's consulting and implementation revenues could significantly beat our 8% growth assumption.

items.title: Aggressive M&A
items.description: Accenture uses its strong cash flows to continually acquire smaller, high-growth niche tech consultancies, which can further compound growth.

items.title: Margin expansion
items.description: Further structural shifts toward higher-value services could push margins higher, generating more FCF per dollar of revenue.

items.title: Corporate IT budget cuts
items.description: As a service provider, ACN is vulnerable to macroeconomic downturns. If large corporations freeze their IT or consulting budgets, growth will stall.

items.title: Wage inflation
items.description: As a talent-driven business, rising wages for highly skilled consultants and engineers can squeeze operating margins.

items.title: In-sourcing trends
items.description: If clients decide to build tech capabilities internally rather than outsourcing, Accenture's long-term growth ceiling could drop.

faq.question: Why use a 9.5% discount rate?
faq.answer: Westmount Research. "Accenture (ACN) Intrinsic Value: A DCF Analysis." westmountfundamentals.com, March 18, 2026. Compiled by Gemini 3.1.
